message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state for Wave C and SAP provider tasks

Update beads issue tracker to reflect current agent assignments:

- bd-3uqg.3.4 (SAP AI Core provider): reassigned from FuchsiaBasin to
  WhiteLynx to continue the integration work
- bd-3uqg.6 (Wave C local/self-hosted/gateway presets): moved from open
  to in_progress, assigned to TealCreek who is beginning the
  local-runtime provider onboarding
